name: Barbeque-Style Pork Steaks
recipeIngredient: 4 Pork shoulder steaks (cut into 1/2 inch thick)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork steaks in half crosswise.
2. Trim excess fat from the steaks.
3. In a large skillet, brown the steaks on both sides in hot oil.
4. Drain the steaks on paper towels.
5. Arrange the onion, green pepper, and tomatoes in the crockery cooker.
6. Sprinkle tapioca over the vegetables.
7. Place the pork steaks atop the vegetables and tapioca.
8. In a small bowl, stir together the barbecue sauce, wine, and cumin.
9. Pour the mixture over the meat and vegetables in the crockery cooker.
10. Cover and cook on low-heat setting for 6 to 8 hours or until the meat and vegetables are tender.
11. To serve, transfer the meat and vegetables to a serving platter.
12. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
